verses.geez:
ወሰምዐ ፡ ከናአን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ አራድ ፡ ዘይነብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ከመ ፡ መጽአ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እንተ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡
                  አታርን ፡ ወተቀበሎሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወማህረኩ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ፄዋ ።

translations.lxx: And Arad the Chananitish king who dwelt by the wilderness, heard that Israel came by the way of Atharin; and he made war on Israel, and carried off some of them captives.
translations.kjv: And when king Arad the Canaanite, which dwelt in the south, heard tell that Israel came by the way of the spies; then he fought against Israel, and took some of them prisoners.

verses.geez:
ወበፅዐ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ብፅዓተ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ለእመ ፡ አግብኦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ሊተ ፡
                  አዐልሎ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ወለአህጉሪሁ ።

translations.lxx: And Israel vowed a vow to the Lord, and said, If thou wilt deliver this people into my power, I will devote it and its cities to thee.
translations.kjv: And Israel vowed a vow unto the LORD, and said, If thou wilt indeed deliver this people into my hand, then I will utterly destroy their cities.

verses.geez:
ወሰምዐ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ቃሎ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወአግብኦሙ ፡ ለከናአን ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደዊሆሙ ፡ ወአዕለልዎሙ ፡ ሎሙ ፡
                  ወለአህጉሪሆሙ ፡ ወሰመዩ ፡ ስሞ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ መካን ፡ ማዕለልት ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord hearkened to the voice of Israel, and delivered the Chananite into his power; and Israel devoted him and his cities, and they called the name of that place Anathema.
translations.kjv: And the LORD hearkened to the voice of Israel, and delivered up the Canaanites; and they utterly destroyed them and their cities: and he called the name of the place Hormah.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ (አፍአ ፡) እምነ ፡ ደብ[ረ ፡ ሆር ፡] መንገለ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ ኤርትራ ፡ ወዖድዎ ፡ ለምድረ ፡ ኤዶም ፡
                  ወተቈጥዐ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ በፍኖት ።

translations.lxx: And having departed from mount Or by the way leading to the Red Sea, they compassed the land of Edom, and the people lost courage by the way.
translations.kjv: And they journeyed from mount Hor by the way of the Red sea, to compass the land of Edom: and the soul of the people was much discouraged because of the way.

verses.geez:
ወሐመይዎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ለምንት ፡ አውፃእከነ ፡ እምነ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ከመ ፡ ትቅትለነ ፡ በውስተ
                  ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ገዳም ፡ እስመ ፡ አልቦቱ ፡ እክለ ፡ ወአልቦቱ ፡ ማየ ፡ ወተቈጥዐት ፡ ነፍስነ ፡ በዝንቱ ፡ ኅብስት ፡ ዘአልቦ ፡
                  በቍዐ ።

translations.lxx: And the people spoke against God and against Moses, saying, Why is this? Hast thou brought us ought of Egypt to slay us in the wilderness? for there is not bread nor water; and our soul loathes this light bread.
translations.kjv: And the people spake against God, and against Moses, Wherefore have ye brought us up out of Egypt to die in the wilderness? for there is no bread, neither is there any water; and our soul loatheth this light bread.

verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አርዌ ፡ ምድር ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘይቀትሎሙ ፡ ወይነስኮሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ወይመውቱ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡
                  ብዙኃን ፡ እምደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord sent among the people deadly serpents, and they bit the people, and much people of the children of Israel died.
translations.kjv: And the LORD sent fiery serpents among the people, and they bit the people; and much people of Israel died.

verses.geez:
ወመጽአ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ አበስነ ፡ እስመ ፡ ሐመይናሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወለከኒ ፡ ጸሊ ፡ እንከሰ
                  ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ወያሴስል ፡ እምኔነ ፡ አርዌ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And the people came to Moses and said, We have sinned, for we have spoken against the Lord, and against thee: pray therefore to the Lord, and let him take away the serpent from us.
translations.kjv: Therefore the people came to Moses, and said, We have sinned, for we have spoken against the LORD, and against thee; pray unto the LORD, that he take away the serpents from us. And Moses prayed for the people.

verses.geez:
ወጸለየ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ በእንተ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ግበር ፡ ለከ ፡ አርዌ ፡
                  ወአንብሮ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይትኤመሩ ፡ ወእምከመ ፡ ነሰከ ፡ አርዌ ፡ ምድር ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘተነስከ ፡ ለይርአዮ ፡ ወለይኅየው ።

translations.lxx: And Moses prayed to the Lord for the people; and the Lord said to Moses, Make thee a serpent, and put it on a signal-staff; and it shall come to pass that whenever a serpent shall bite a man, every one so bitten that looks upon it shall live.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Make thee a fiery serpent, and set it upon a pole: and it shall come to pass, that every one that is bitten, when he looketh upon it, shall live.

verses.geez:
ወገብረ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ አርዌ ፡ ምድር ፡ ዘብርት ፡ ወአቀሞ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይትኤመሩ ፡ ወኮነ ፡ እምከመ ፡ ነሰከ ፡ አርዌ ፡ ምድር
                  ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ይኔጽሮ ፡ ለዝክቱ ፡ አርዌ ፡ ምድር ፡ ዘብርት ፡ ወየሐዩ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses made a serpent of brass, and put it upon a signal-staff: and it came to pass that whenever a serpent bit a man, and he looked on the brazen serpent, he lived.
translations.kjv: And Moses made a serpent of brass, and put it upon a pole, and it came to pass, that if a serpent had bitten any man, when he beheld the serpent of brass, he lived.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኦቦት ።

translations.lxx: And the children of Israel departed, and encamped in Oboth.
translations.kjv: And the children of Israel set forward, and pitched in Oboth.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኦቦት ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኬልጋይ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ እንተ ፡ አንጻረ ፡ ገጹ ፡
                  ለሞአብ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ምሥራቀ ፡ ፀሐይ ።

translations.lxx: And having departed from Oboth, they encamped in Achalgai, on the farther side in the wilderness, which is opposite Moab, toward the east.
translations.kjv: And they journeyed from Oboth, and pitched at Ijeabarim, in the wilderness which is before Moab, toward the sunrising.

verses.geez: ወግዕዙ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቈላተ ፡ ዛሬት ።

translations.lxx: And thence they departed, and encamped in the valley of Zared.
translations.kjv: From thence they removed, and pitched in the valley of Zared.

verses.geez:
ወግዕዙ ፡ እምህየ ፡ ወኀደሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ አርኖን ፡ ዘይክዑ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አድባር ፡ ዘአሞሬዎን ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ደወሎሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለሞአብ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: And they departed thence and encamped on the other side of Arnon in the wilderness, the country which extends from the coasts of the Amorites; for Arnon is the borders of Moab, between Moab and the Amorites.
translations.kjv: From thence they removed, and pitched on the other side of Arnon, which is in the wilderness that cometh out of the coasts of the Amorites: for Arnon is the border of Moab, between Moab and the Amorites.

verses.geez: ወበበይነ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ይብል ፡ ውስተ ፡ መጽሐፍ ፡ ፀብኡ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አውዐያ ፡ ለዞዖም ።

translations.lxx: Therefore it is said in a book, A war of the Lord has set on fire Zoob, and the brooks of Arnon.
translations.kjv: Wherefore it is said in the book of the wars of the LORD, What he did in the Red sea, and in the brooks of Arnon,

verses.geez: ወአቀመ ፡ ወሓይዝተ ፡ አርኖን ፡ ዘሀለወ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዔር ፡ ዘይሰመይ ፡ ደወለ ፡ ሞአብ ።

translations.lxx: And he has appointed brooks to cause Er to dwell there; and it lies near to the coasts of Moab.
translations.kjv: And at the stream of the brooks that goeth down to the dwelling of Ar, and lieth upon the border of Moab.

verses.geez:
ወእምህየ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፤ ዐዘቅት ፡ ዘይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ አስተጋብእ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ወእሁቦሙ ፡ ማየ ፡
                  ዘይሰትዩ ።

translations.lxx: And thence they came to the well; this is the well of which the Lord said to Moses, Gather the people, and I will give them water to drink.
translations.kjv: And from thence they went to Beer: that is the well whereof the LORD spake unto Moses, Gather the people together, and I will give them water.

verses.geez: ይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ኀለዩ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዛተ ፡ ማኅሌተ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ አቅድሙ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፤

translations.lxx: Then Israel sang this song at the well, Begin to sing of the well;
translations.kjv: Then Israel sang this song, Spring up, O well; sing ye unto it:

verses.geez:
እንተ ፡ ከረይዋ ፡ መላእክት ፡ ወወቀርዋ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ በምኵናኖሙ ፤ ወእምይአቲ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  መንተናይን ።

translations.lxx: the princes digged it, the kings of the nations in their kingdom, in their lordship sank it in the rock: and they went from the well to Manthanain,
translations.kjv: The princes digged the well, the nobles of the people digged it, by the direction of the lawgiver, with their staves. And from the wilderness they went to Mattanah:

verses.geez: ወእምነ ፡ መንተናይን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ናሐሊየል ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ናሐሊየል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ባሞት ።

translations.lxx: and from Manthanain to Naaliel, and from Naaliel to Bamoth, and from Bamoth to Janen, which is in the plain of Moab as seen from the top of the quarried rock that looks toward the wilderness.
translations.kjv: And from Mattanah to Nahaliel: and from Nahaliel to Bamoth:

verses.geez:
ወእምነ ፡ ባሞት ፡ ውስተ ፡ አናጴን ፡ እንተ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘሞአብ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ ርእሱ ፡ ለዘ ፡ ንዱቅ ፡
                  ዘይኔጽር ፡ መንገለ ፡ ገጸ ፡ ገዳም ።

translations.lxx: And Moses sent ambassadors to Seon king of the Amorites, with peaceable words, saying,
translations.kjv: And from Bamoth in the valley, that is in the country of Moab, to the top of Pisgah, which looketh toward Jeshimon.

verses.geez: ወፈነወ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ተናብልተ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ በቃለ ፡ ሰላም ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይብል ፤

translations.lxx: We will pass through thy land, we will go by the road; we will not turn aside to the field or to the vineyard.
translations.kjv: And Israel sent messengers unto Sihon king of the Amorites, saying,

verses.geez:
ንኅልፍአ ፡ እንተአ ፡ ምድርከ ፡ ወመንገደ ፡ ነኀልፍ ፡ ወኢንትገሐሥ ፡ ኢውስተ ፡ ገራህት ፡ ወኢውስተ ፡ ዐጸደ ፡ ወይን
                  ፡ ወኢንሰቲ ፡ ማየ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዐዘቃቲከ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ መጽያሕተ ፡ ነሐውር ፡ እስከአ ፡ ነሐልፍአ ፡ እምደወልከአ ።

translations.lxx: We will not drink water out of thy well; we will go by the king's highway, until we have past thy boundaries.
translations.kjv: Let me pass through thy land: we will not turn into the fields, or into the vineyards; we will not drink of the waters of the well: but we will go along by the king’s high way, until we be past thy borders.

verses.geez:
ወኢአብሖሙ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ይኅልፉ ፡ እንተ ፡ ደወሉ ፡ ወአስተጋብአ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ሰብኦ ፡ ወወፅአ ፡
                  ይትቃተሉሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወበጽሐ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኢየሰ ፡ ወተቃተሎሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And Seon did not allow Israel to pass through his borders, and Seon gathered all his people, and went out to set the battle in array against Israel into the wilderness; and he came to Jassa, and set the battle in array against Israel.
translations.kjv: And Sihon would not suffer Israel to pass through his border: but Sihon gathered all his people together, and went out against Israel into the wilderness: and he came to Jahaz, and fought against Israel.

verses.geez:
ወቀተልዎሙ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ቀትለ ፡ በኀፂን ፡ ወገብአ ፡ ሎሙ ፡ ብሔሩ ፡ እምነ ፡ አርኖን ፡ እስከ ፡ ኢያቦቅ ፡ እስከ ፡
                  ደቂቀ ፡ ዐማን ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢያዜር ፡ ደወሎሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ ዐማን ።

translations.lxx: And Israel smote him with the slaughter of the sword, and they became possessors of his land, from Arnon to Jaboc, as far as the children of Amman, for Jazer is the borders of the children of Amman.
translations.kjv: And Israel smote him with the edge of the sword, and possessed his land from Arnon unto Jabbok, even unto the children of Ammon: for the border of the children of Ammon was strong.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ኵሎን ፡ ውእቶን ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ወነበረ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡
                  በሔሴቦን ፡ ወበኵሉ ፡ ደወላ ።

translations.lxx: And Israel took all their cities, and Israel dwelt in all the cities of the Amorites, in Esebon, and in all cities belonging to it.
translations.kjv: And Israel took all these cities: and Israel dwelt in all the cities of the Amorites, in Heshbon, and in all the villages thereof.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ በሔሴቦን ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ ወውእቱ ፡ ዘፀብኦ ፡ ቀዲሙ ፡ ለንጉሠ ፡ ሞአብ ፡
                  ወነሥአ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ምድሮ ፡ እምነ ፡ አሮኤር ፡ እስከ ፡ አርኖን ።

translations.lxx: For Esebon is the city of Seon king of the Amorites; and he before fought against the king of Moab, and they took all his land, from Aroer to Arnon.
translations.kjv: For Heshbon was the city of Sihon the king of the Amorites, who had fought against the former king of Moab, and taken all his land out of his hand, even unto Arnon.

verses.geez:
ወበእንተ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ይብሉ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ንግመጥስጤ ፡ [ሑ]ሩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሔሴቦን ፡ ከመ ፡ ትትነደቅ ፡ ወይትገበር ፡
                  አህጉረ ፡ ሴዎን ።

translations.lxx: Therefore say they who deal in dark speeches, Come to Esebon, that the city of Seon may be built and prepared.
translations.kjv: Wherefore they that speak in proverbs say, Come into Heshbon, let the city of Sihon be built and prepared:

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ እሳት ፡ ወፅአት ፡ እምነ ፡ ሔሴቦን ፡ ወነድ ፡ እምነ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ወበልዐት ፡ እስከ ፡ ሞአብ ፡
                  ወውሕጠት ፡ ሐውልተ ፡ አርኖን ።

translations.lxx: For a fire has gone forth from Esebon, a flame from the city of Seon, and has consumed as far as Moab, and devoured the pillars of Arnon.
translations.kjv: For there is a fire gone out of Heshbon, a flame from the city of Sihon: it hath consumed Ar of Moab, and the lords of the high places of Arnon.

verses.geez:
አሌ ፡ ለ[ኪ] ፡ ሞአብ ፡ ሐጐልኪዮሙ ፡ ለሕዝበ ፡ ከሞስ ፡ እለ ፡ ገብኡ ፡ ወደቂቆሙሰ ፡ አድኀንክሙ ፡ ወአዋልዲሆሙ ፡
                  ተፄወዋ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ አሞሬዎን ።

translations.lxx: Woe to thee, Moab; thou art lost, thou people of Chamos: their sons are sold for preservation, and their daughters are captives to Seon king of the Amorites.
translations.kjv: Woe to thee, Moab! thou art undone, O people of Chemosh: he hath given his sons that escaped, and his daughters, into captivity unto Sihon king of the Amorites.

verses.geez: ወዘርኦሙኒ ፡ ደምሰሶሙ ፡ ሔሴቦን ፡ እስከ ፡ ዴቦን ፡ ወአንስቲያሆሙኒ ፡ ዓዲ ፡ አንደዳ ፡ እሳተ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሞአብ ።

translations.lxx: And their seed shall perish from Esebon to Dæbon; and their women have yet farther kindled a fire against Moab.
translations.kjv: We have shot at them; Heshbon is perished even unto Dibon, and we have laid them waste even unto Nophah, which reacheth unto Medeba.

verses.geez: ወነበረ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ አሞሬዎን ።

translations.lxx: And Israel dwelt in all the cities of the Amorites.
translations.kjv: Thus Israel dwelt in the land of the Amorites.

verses.geez:
ወፈነወ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ይርአይዋ ፡ ለኢያዜር ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ አስተግብእዋ ፡ ምስለ ፡ አህጉሪሃ ፡ ወአውፅእዎሙ ፡ ለአሞሬዎን ፡
                  እለ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ህየ ።

translations.lxx: And Moses sent to spy out Jazer; and they took it, and its villages, and cast out the Amorite that dwelt there.
translations.kjv: And Moses sent to spy out Jaazer, and they took the villages thereof, and drove out the Amorites that were there.

verses.geez:
ወተመይጡ ፡ ወዐርጉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ወወፅአ ፡ ኣግ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ባሳን ፡ ወተቀበሎሙ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡
                  ሕዝቡ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትቃተሎሙ ፡ [በ]አድራይን ።

translations.lxx: And having returned, they went up the road that leads to Basan; and Og the king of Basan went forth to meet them, and all his people to war to Edrain.
translations.kjv: And they turned and went up by the way of Bashan: and Og the king of Bashan went out against them, he, and all his people, to the battle at Edrei.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ኢትፍርሆ ፡ እስመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ አገብኦ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ሕዝቡ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ምድሩ
                  ፡ ወትገብሮ ፡ ከመ ፡ ገበርካሁ ፡ ለሴዎን ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ ዘይነብር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሔሴቦን ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Moses, Fear him not; for I have delivered him and all his people, and all his land, into thy hands; and thou shalt do to him as thou didst to Seon king of the Amorites, who dwelt in Esebon.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Moses, Fear him not: for I have delivered him into thy hand, and all his people, and his land; and thou shalt do to him as thou didst unto Sihon king of the Amorites, which dwelt at Heshbon.

verses.geez: ወቀተሎ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ሕዝቡ ፡ እስከ ፡ ኢአትረፈ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ነፋጺተ ፡ ወተወርሱ ፡ ምድሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he smote him and his sons, and all his people, until he left none of his to be taken alive; and they inherited his land.
translations.kjv: So they smote him, and his sons, and all his people, until there was none left him alive: and they possessed his land.
